creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for the patch Olivier, I have excluded the APPS options and made the following changes to the current version:

- Update to 0.14.6
- Add patch for unit test failure (https://github.com/benoitc/gunicorn/issues/390)
- Add LICENSE
- Add TORNADO worker OPTION
- Add TESTS unittest OPTION
- Add test: target
- Add NO_OPTIONS_SORT
- Tweak OPTIONS descriptions
- Whitespace

==[QA]==
port test clean
redports build clean: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20120818050159-280/
unittest clean: Ran 57 tests in 1.941s - OK (SKIP=3)
